content:
# Overall Project Summary: Jun 20, 2026

Development on June 20 focused on significant cloud infrastructure hardening and the launch of mobile performance telemetry. Key achievements include reducing dedicated-chat latency by up to 80% and implementing a new Mobile Resource Workbench, while the team has initiated a comprehensive overhaul of voice and command systems.

## 🚨 Needs Attention 
- **Urgent Discussions**: [elizaos/eliza#8810](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8810) – Developers are evaluating the removal of redundant client-side pairing logic in favor of server-side session management for cloud-sandbox agent handoffs.
- **Blocked Issues/PRs**: [elizaos/eliza#8756](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8756) – Ongoing coordination is required to finalize host-side steps for launch-hardening and staging environment verification.

## ✅ Completed Work

**Cloud Infrastructure & Latency Optimization**
*   Reduced dedicated-chat latency from ~30s to 6–11s by optimizing DB-locality and excluding unnecessary plugins ([elizaos/eliza#8783](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8783), [elizaos/eliza#8771](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8771), [elizaos/eliza#8762](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8762)).
*   Resolved Postgres connection pooling issues by implementing local in-container PGlite databases ([elizaos/eliza#8754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8754)).
*   Improved response times by deferring billing/settlement chains off the hot path ([elizaos/eliza#8759](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8759)).

**Mobile Performance & Telemetry**
*   Launched the Mobile Resource Workbench to track battery, RSS, token throughput, and thermal states on iOS and Android ([elizaos/eliza#8814](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8814), [elizaos/eliza#8800](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8800)).
*   Optimized bundle sizes by pruning desktop runtime dependencies ([elizaos/eliza#8774](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8774)).

**Core Pipeline & UI Enhancements**
*   Enabled app-level control over dynamic provider filtering via the new `compose_state_providers` hook ([elizaos/eliza#8778](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8778), [elizaos/eliza#8755](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8755)).
*   Enhanced UI responsiveness through improved hero registry caching and package-local preview images ([elizaos/eliza#8806](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8806)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

**New Pull Requests**
*   **Cloud & UI:** [elizaos/eliza#8820](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8820), [elizaos/eliza#8819](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8819), [elizaos/eliza#8818](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8818), [elizaos/eliza#8817](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8817).
*   **Plugin & Core:** [elizaos/eliza#8784](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8784), [elizaos/eliza#8782](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8782), [elizaos/eliza#8781](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8781), [elizaos/eliza#8780](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8780), [elizaos/eliza#8777](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8777), [elizaos/eliza#8776](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8776), [elizaos/eliza#8775](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8775), [elizaos/eliza#8773](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8773), [elizaos/eliza#8772](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8772), [elizaos/eliza#8770](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8770), [elizaos/eliza#8767](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8767), [elizaos/eliza#8766](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8766), [elizaos/eliza#8765](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8765), [elizaos/eliza#8764](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8764), [elizaos/eliza#8763](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8763), [elizaos/eliza#8761](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8761), [elizaos/eliza#8760](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8760), [elizaos/eliza#8758](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8758), [elizaos/eliza#8757](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8757), [elizaos/eliza#8804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8804), [elizaos/eliza#8803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8803).
